default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming product updates.](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: Overall sessions increased, but Google's proportion of traffic is decreasing slightly. LLM referrals have increased.](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Product updates: Galileo is delaying competitor content for 3-4 weeks due to platform and positioning changes. Multiple product announcements planned over the next few weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Content strategy: Plans to create a hub of programmatically generated comparison pages for AI models, pending internal data science team input.](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Team logistics: Conor and Jackson will be out of office for a week each in late July/early August. Next sync moved to July 30th.](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Analytics

  - [7 articles delivered and published last week](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Inline CTAs added to all articles](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Podcast links being added to top-performing blogs (about halfway done)](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Overall sessions increased, with LLM referrals rising](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Google's proportion of traffic showing a slight downward trend](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Non-branded performance: Impressions spiked post-migration, then fell slightly](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [No concerning drops in positions observed](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Product Updates and Announcements

  - [Competitor content delayed 3-4 weeks due to platform and positioning changes](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Upcoming announcements:](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [Insight Engine page and capabilities (this week)](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
      - [AWS Agents Partnership (next week)](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [Agent Reliability Platform update (next week)](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
      - [Agent Leaderboard (next week)](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
      - [DigitalOcean partnership (following week)](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
      - [Open source collect over a part of the agency (following week)](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
      - [New agent metrics (end of month)](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Plans for programmatically generated comparison pages for AI models](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Example shared from another client (Ramp) showing review pages, alternatives pages, and versus pages](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Jackson to lead this project, coordinating with internal data science team (Vatsoul and Rashaun)](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Galileo hiring new product marketers](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Review queue expected to be completed by end of the week](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Conor out of office next week](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Jackson and Conor both out for a week in late July/early August](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to share example comparison pages in Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Vivek to troubleshoot and update non-branded performance data in Looker](https://fathom.video/share/_39ayUm1pFpQGEzSJG7kBs9Rs57ED4oN?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
